sourceMovie.title: Sharper
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Sharper for the same reason it broke through in 2023: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a crime rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Benjamin Caron keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The thriller and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: American Psycho
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Sharper clicked for you, American Psycho (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Sharper?
faq.answer: Try American Psycho, Fast & Furious, Donnie Brasco—each shares DNA with Sharper while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Sharper?
faq.answer: Sharper (2023) is best described as Thriller, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Sharper worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
